productDisplayName: Baggit Women Bronze Rapchik Chino Wallet
description: Style Note Keep your essentials together stylishly in this multi-function wallet from baggit. This light weight and slim, simply designed wallet and an imprinted brand mark reveals dual sided flap with snap button closure. It has multiple pockets inside which makes it spacious. Grab it and add a bit to your daily style. Product Details Bronze wallet with fabric bow details on the front  Has a flap with a zippered pocket, one id card holder and one card holder One compartment with a zippered pocket and one insert pocket Has another compartment with a zip closureOne pocket with zip closure on the back  Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust    Size Height: 8 cm Width: 15 cmDepth: 2 cm
